existing_crisis_plan: Draft field security plan 2023; HQ crisis addendum pending board approval
existing_bcp: Programme continuity plans for Kenya and South Sudan; last reviewed 2024
cyber_incident_playbook: Shared IT provider IR playbook; NGO data classified per donor requirements
field_team_security: HEAT-trained field staff in South Sudan; daily check-in protocol via satellite phone
duty_of_care_travelers: Travel tracker maintained in HQ; welfare checks every 12 hours in elevated risk periods
local_partner_vetting: Implementing partners assessed annually for security and financial integrity
kidnap_hostage_response: K&R policy with retained specialist firm; staff briefed pre-deployment
donor_stakeholder_comms: Major donors notified within 4 hours for Level 2+ security incidents
last_tabletop_exercise: 2024 Q3 field security incident tabletop with HQ and Kenya country team
employee_notification: SMS and Signal cascade to all staff in affected country
risk_register: Field security and operational risks reviewed quarterly by SMT
historical_incidents: 2022 temporary suspension in South Sudan due to nearby armed clash; no staff injuries
travel_exposure: 35 field staff across Kenya and South Sudan; expatriate and national staff mix

family_liaison.protocol: Family contact within 2 hours of confirmed serious injury

business_model: Grant-funded humanitarian programmes; top 5 donors represent 70% of funding
insurance_program: K&R, medical evacuation, and liability via broker; policy summary on file at HQ
data_privacy_program: GDPR-aligned donor and beneficiary data handling; DPO contact at HQ
physical_security: Compound security at Juba field office; access control at Nairobi office
post_incident_review: After-action review within 10 days; led by Crisis Lead
insurance_claims: Broker notified within 24 hours for K&R or medevac triggers
investor_relations: N/A - charity; donor relations managed by Executive Director
vendor_notification: Implementing partners notified when programme suspension affects joint operations
medical_emergency_response: Medevac provider on retainer; clinic referrals documented per country
tabletop_history: 2024 Q3 field security; 2023 donor reputational scenario
monitoring_alert_services: Local security intelligence subscription for South Sudan
social_media_monitoring: Communications volunteer monitors during Level 2+ events

delegation_of_authority.programme_spend: Country Director up to GBP 25k emergency spend

evacuation_capability.South Sudan: Medevac and relocation plan reviewed semi-annually with security vendor

geopolitical_exposure: South Sudan active conflict monitoring; Kenya election period watch
